description: Electron Main Process + React Frontend: Implement the Electron main process (main.ts, preload.ts, python-bridge.ts, ipc-handlers.ts) and the React frontend with all components (auth, dashboard, export wizard), Zustand stores, hooks, and types.
steps: Create electron/main.ts: Electron app entry with BrowserWindow (frameless, dark bg), PythonBridge init, IPC handler registration, dev/prod URL loading as per plan
Create electron/preload.ts: contextBridge exposing teleexport API (python.call, python.onEvent, python.offEvent, dialog.selectDirectory, dialog.openFile, app.getVersion)

Create electron/python-bridge.ts: PythonBridge class extending EventEmitter - spawn Python child_process, call() with promise/timeout, handleMessage() for responses and events, stdin/stdout JSON-RPC communication
Create electron/ipc-handlers.ts: registerIPCHandlers() proxying python:call, forwarding python events to renderer, dialog:selectDirectory, shell:openFile handlers
Create electron/menu.ts: Application menu with File, Edit, View, Help menus
Create electron/window-manager.ts: Window state management (maximize, minimize, close)
Create src/types/ipc.types.ts: TypeScript interfaces for IPC messages, TeleExport API (window.teleexport type), IPCMessage, RPCRequest, RPCResponse
Create src/types/chat.types.ts: Chat, ChatDetailed, ChatType, Message, MediaType interfaces
Create src/types/export.types.ts: ExportConfig, ExportProgress, ExportStatus, ExportResult interfaces
Create src/stores/auth.store.ts: Zustand store with full auth flow as per plan (checkSession, sendCode, verifyCode, verifyPassword, logout)
Create src/stores/chats.store.ts: Zustand store for chat list (loadChats, searchChats, getChatDetails)
Create src/stores/export.store.ts: Zustand store with export config, progress tracking, startExport, cancelExport as per plan
Create src/stores/settings.store.ts: App settings store (outputDir, theme, language)
Create src/hooks/useIPC.ts: Hook for IPC bridge helper (call python, subscribe to events)
Create src/hooks/useExportProgress.ts: Hook for subscribing to export progress events
Create src/hooks/useChats.ts: Hook for loading and filtering chats
Create src/components/layout/AppShell.tsx: Main layout with sidebar, content area, and title bar
Create src/components/layout/Sidebar.tsx: Navigation sidebar with menu items (Dashboard, Export, Settings)
Create src/components/layout/TitleBar.tsx: Custom frameless window title bar with window controls (minimize, maximize, close)
Create src/components/auth/AuthScreen.tsx: Main auth container switching between phone/code/password steps
Create src/components/auth/PhoneInput.tsx: Phone number input with international format
Create src/components/auth/CodeInput.tsx: Verification code input (6 digits)
Create src/components/auth/PasswordInput.tsx: 2FA password input
Create src/components/dashboard/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard with stats overview and chat list
Create src/components/dashboard/ChatList.tsx: Scrollable chat list with search
Create src/components/dashboard/ChatCard.tsx: Individual chat card (avatar, name, type badge, message count)
Create src/components/dashboard/SearchBar.tsx: Search input for filtering chats
Create src/components/dashboard/StatsOverview.tsx: Stats cards (total chats, messages, media)
Create src/components/export/ExportWizard.tsx: Multi-step export wizard (select chats -> config -> confirm -> progress)
Create src/components/export/ChatSelector.tsx: Chat selection with checkboxes and search
Create src/components/export/FormatSelector.tsx: Export format selection (HTML/JSON/CSV/PDF)
Create src/components/export/DateRangePicker.tsx: Date range picker for filtering messages
Create src/components/export/MediaOptions.tsx: Media type selection checkboxes
Create src/components/export/ExportProgress.tsx: Real-time progress display with per-chat progress bars
Create src/components/shared/Button.tsx: Reusable button component with variants (primary, secondary, danger)
Create src/components/shared/Modal.tsx: Modal dialog component
Create src/components/shared/ProgressBar.tsx: Animated progress bar component
Create src/components/shared/Badge.tsx: Badge/tag component for chat types
Create src/components/shared/Skeleton.tsx: Loading skeleton component
Create src/App.tsx: Root app component with router (auth check, routing between auth/dashboard/export)
Create src/main.tsx: React entry point with createRoot, App render
Create src/index.css: Tailwind CSS imports (@tailwind base/components/utilities) and global styles with dark theme variables
acceptance_criteria: Vite builds successfully (npm run build produces dist/ directory)
All React components are properly typed and export default/named exports
Zustand stores have correct TypeScript interfaces
Electron main process files compile correctly
